title: FBreakDance30's 3D Mace
description: This Pack makes the Mace 3D like the Trident and it fixes the Breeze Rod holding position to be handeld instead of generated (so, like the Stick or the Blaze Rod).
body:
# **FBreakDance30's 3D Mace**

## _Features_

This Pack makes the Mace 3D, because, personally, I think that the Mace should have been 3D, like the Trident.

Also, it fixes the Breeze Rod holding position to be handeld instead of generated (so, like the Stick or the Blaze Rod).
